page.name: Fractal5 /demo-1
page.role: current public Squarespace bridge for the Dominion OS controlled-preview demo proof surface

requiredAssertions: Public proof for a governed command system.
Full self-serve SaaS launch, customer portal green, production observability green, and autonomous self-healing are not claimed without separate receipts.

visualRuntimePolishChecks.rule: The live bridge should place the demo hero materially higher in the first viewport and avoid a large empty Squarespace spacer before the proof bridge.

runtimeFreshnessRequirements.rule: Health and status receipts must be current and non-regressing; stale runtime payloads cannot support cloud-health green.

publicBridgeGates: live /demo-1 deployed page exposes the current public proof bridge assertions
visual polish patch is applied or available to remove the empty first-fold gap
Cloud Run /demo, /health, /status, /demo/status, and MP4 routes are declared and probed
source-served manifest, package, data, release receipts, readiness, watchlist, and proof index remain public-safe
full commercial green stays blocked unless separate commercial, observability, rollback, and autonomous-operation receipts exist
commercialGreenGates: daemon watchlist ingestion receipt if monitoring is intentionally enabled
operator-triggered probe output for /demo-1, Cloud Run routes, and raw assets before high-stakes demos
autonomous remediation/self-healing receipt if that claim is made

claimControl.reason: The public bridge and source-served assets support controlled preview sharing. Direct MP4 routes are verified. Full self-serve commerce, native GCP self-healing, production observability, and production customer portal proof require separate receipts.
